headline: Synchrony (SYF) Announces Executive Leadership Changes to Accelerate Digital and AI Growth
summary: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) is one of the best quality stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On June 29, Synchrony announced key executive leadership changes across its Digital platform and Technology and Operations organizations to accelerate digital growth and AI adoption. Carol Juel has been named CEO of Synchrony’s Digital platform, succeeding the retiring […]
